otpSentToEmail: We sent the verification code to email:
privacyIntro: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and share your information when using the app.
infoCollectionDetail:
We collect the following information when you use the app:
• Full name
• Email and phone number
• Payment information
• Order history and preferences
infoUsageDetail:
The information we collect is used for the following purposes:
• Processing orders and shipping
• Improving your in-app experience
• Sending promotional offers and marketing content
• Providing technical support and customer service
infoSharingDetail:
We do not share your personal information with third parties except in the following cases:
• With shipping companies to process orders
• When required by law or legal obligations
• For analytics and statistics in an anonymized manner
dataSecurityDetail: We follow best practices to protect your personal data and use encryption and secure storage to ensure its safety.
userRightsDetail: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your data, and you can contact us for any privacy-related inquiries.
privacyUpdatesDetail: We may update the privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted in the app, and users should review them periodically.
acceptPolicy: I agree to the privacy policy
acceptPolicyError: You must accept the privacy policy to proceed
selectAtLeastOneImage: Please select at least one image
